compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement overlay output parsing and findings merge
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Implement the overlay output parsing and merge point where overlay findings join tier reviewer findings.

### Implementation
1. Parse red team output per security-red-team-output.md contract
2. For security: pass red team findings to blue team, collect blue team dispositions
3. Parse performance reviewer output
4. Merge surviving overlay findings with tier review findings in review-status artifact
5. Pass merged findings to resolution loop

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (merge logic section)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-dispatch.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Merge logic documented in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
  Verify: grep -q "merge.*overlay\|overlay.*findings" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
